title: How to Create Winning Freelance Proposals? (Ready AI Pipeline)
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating Venngage's AI Proposal Generator tool for creating freelance proposals. The video shows how to generate a client-ready branded proposal from a single prompt, refine it using Brand Kit and AI Writing Assistant, and export as PDF.
